articles.title: Autonomous security agents need complete data. Here's how to check if yours is ready.
articles.summary: An endpoint agent cannot report its own absence. articles.title: New agentic memory framework uses 118K tokens per query. LangMem burns through 3.26M.

articles.title: The attack that hijacked Claude Code came through Sentry. Datadog, PagerDuty, and Jira have the same exposure.
articles.summary: A single fake error report hijacked Claude Code in controlled testing — the agent ran the attacker's code with the developer's full privileges, and not one alert fired. articles.title: Google warns EU's plans to weaken its monopoly could expose user data
articles.summary: The EU wants Google to share search data with competitors and open up AI on Android, but Google alleges major privacy risks.

articles.summary: South Korea targets physical AI lead and commercial humanoid robots by 2028.
